reviews.comment:
Un desastre los playeros, tratan mal, pareciera que no tienen ganas de vivir y se toman todo el tiempo del mundo para cargar

(Translated by Google)
The beach attendants are a disaster; they treat you badly, it seems like they have no will to live, and they take all the time in the world to load up.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7652943530366249800/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQxLTdDTi1RRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buena la estación de servicio, sólo que a partir de las 23hs no te venden ficha para cargar agua para el mate

(Translated by Google)
The gas station is very good, except that after 11 pm they don't sell tokens to fill up with water for mate.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7652943530366249800/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQxeHBlYVRREAE

reviews.comment:
Servicio regular, y me sirvieron un café con la taza sucia. Una pena

(Translated by Google)
The service was mediocre, and they served me coffee in a dirty cup. A shame.

reviews.comment:
los plateros excelente y las chicas muy amables,tener cuidado con lo que dejas en el auto estacionado te lo abren con un inhibidor de señal y te lo desvalijan

(Translated by Google)
The silversmiths are excellent and the girls are very friendly. Be careful with what you leave in your parked car; they'll break in with a signal jammer and steal everything.
